name: Cloud Ingest -> AI Analyze -> Feishu Bitable

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { model: 'gpt-5', temperature: 0.2, response_format: { type: 'json_object' }, messages: [ { role: 'system', content: 'You are a structured news assistant. Output strict JSON format: {"items":[{"source_id":"","summary_cn":"","tags":"tag1,tag2","stance":"支持/反对/中立"}]}' }, { role: 'user', content: JSON.stringify({ items: (($node["Webhook Ingest"].json.body?.items || $node["Webhook Ingest"].json.items || []).slice(0, 120).map(i => ({ source_id: i.source_id, title: i.title, url: i.url, content: i.content_full || i.content_snippet || '' }))) }) } ] } }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { ok: true, inserted: $node['Build Bitable Records'].json.count, ts: new Date().toISOString() } }}
